zh.Blackfriars, London, England: 英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Parr於1515年6月15日出生在英國倫敦布拉可福利亞斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas Parr40歲，母親Maud Green23歲。她於1538年2月與Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1552年2月20日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年36歲，埋葬在英國倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.Blackfriars, London, England: 英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Parr于1515年6月15日出生在英国倫敦布拉可福利亞斯时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Parr40岁，母亲Maud Green23岁。她于1538年2月与Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1552年2月20日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年36岁，埋葬在英国倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Parr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Parr in Lancashire, or from residence at an enclosure (Middle English parr, Old English pearr).
German: from Middle Low German parre ‘parish, district, minister's house’; a metonymic occupational name for a parson or for someone who worked in a parsonage or manse. Compare Pfarr .
English: variant of Pear with the common late Middle English and early modern English change of -er- to -ar-.

variants.name: Pare
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri, Laurent, Normand, Fernand, Alphonse, Clermont, Elphege, Alain, Benoit, Gaston, Girard.
French (Paré): occupational name for someone who finished cloth, from the past participle of parer ‘to prepare’.

variants.name: Parman
meanings: Americanized form of German Parmann: variant of Parr .
Possibly an altered form of German Bärmann (see Barmann ).

variants.name: Porr
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ulrike, Gunther.
metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of leeks or other vegetables, from Middle High German porre, pforre ‘leek’ (from Latin porrum).

variants.name: Pfarr
meanings: South German: from Middle High German pfarr ‘district, parish’ or pfarre(r) ‘parish priest’, hence an occupational name for a parson, or a topographic name for someone who lived near the parsonage.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Parr was born on 15 June 1515, in Blackfriars, London, England, her father, Sir Thomas Parr, was 40 and her mother, Maud Green, was 23. She married Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke in February 1538, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 February 1552, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Parr est née le 15 juin 1515, à Blackfriars, Londres, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Parr, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud Green, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke en février 1538, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 février 1552, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à St Paul's Cathedral, Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Parr am 15. Juni 1515 in Blackfriars, London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Parr 40 und ihre Mutter Maud Green 23. Sie hat im Februar 1538 in London, England Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. Februar 1552 im Alter von 36 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Parr è nata il il 15 giugno 1515 nel Blackfriars, London, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Parr, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Maud Green, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke nel febbraio 1538, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 febbraio 1552, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a St Paul's Cathedral, London, England.

ja.Hendon, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスヘンドン

ja.Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア
ja.Blackfriars, London, England: イギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズ
ja.lifeSummary: Anne Parrが1515年6月15日にイギリスロンドンブラクフリアルズで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Parrは40歳，母Maud Greenは23歳であった。1538年2月にイギリスロンドンでSir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembrokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1552年2月20日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで36歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンスト プアウル'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Parr(이)가 1515년 6월 15일 영국 런던 블랙프리아르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Parr(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Green(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1538년 2월 영국 런던에서 Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1552년 2월 20일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

mn.15 June 1515–20 February 1552: 1515 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 15–1552 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 20

pt.15 June 1515–20 February 1552: 15 de junho de 1515–20 de fevereiro de 1552
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Parr nasceu em 15 de junho de 1515, em Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Parr, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maud Green, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke em fevereiro de 1538, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1552, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Parr родилась 15 июня 1515 г. в местности блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Parr было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Green, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke февраль 1538 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 февраля 1552 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия.

es.15 June 1515–20 February 1552: 15 de junio de 1515–20 de febrero de 1552
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Parr nació el 15 de junio de 1515, en Blackfriars, London, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Parr, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Maud Green, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir William Herbert 1st Earl of Pembroke en febrero de 1538, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1552, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra.
